text: Competitive dynamics in the AI race present notable risks, with Alphabet gaining ground on Apple in the consumer AI segment as Gemini adoption accelerates. Apple's stock has underperformed significantly, down approximately 15% year-to-date while broader markets rallied from April and May lows. Over the past year, AAPL returned -5.80% compared to the S&P 500's 13.56% gain, representing 19.36 percentage points of underperformance. This divergence suggests investors are increasingly concerned about Apple's ability to compete in AI-driven product categories.
